brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Zoom in. Show me every minute for chrono-portal-mirror. Rate and errors both.

expected.sql: SELECT minute, ROUND(n / 60.0, 2) AS rps, ROUND(errors / 60.0, 2) AS err_rps FROM metrics WHERE service = 'chrono-portal-mirror' ORDER BY minute

hints.text: Carol: 'Too many rows. The WHERE clause is already filtering to chrono-portal-mirror.'
Carol: 'Not enough rows. The error field is errors.'
Carol: 'Query error. The second rate() field is errors — the error count column.'
Carol: 'Wrong values. The error field is errors.'
Carol: 'rate(errors, 1m). The errors column is the count of error events that minute.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Six spikes. The rest is flat. Whatever this thing is, it doesn't run continuously — it fires and goes quiet.
